name: Honey Chicken
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F. Prepare a 9x13-inch baking pan with cooking spray.
In a shallow bowl, mix together the flour, salt, pepper, and paprika; dip chicken in the flour mixture.
Add the chicken pieces to the pan, then bake for 30 minutes, skin side down, in a single layer.
Meanwhile, in a small bowl, mix together the sauce ingredients.
Turn the chicken over, then cover with sauce. Bake for an additional 30 minutes, or until the chicken is fork-tender and no pink remains.
Spoon the sauce over the chicken again and serve.
